traits.locale_text:
Whenever the user suffers damage (except from damage-over-time effects), they must pass a Perception resistance test with a −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} penalty. On a failed test, the user gains +1 stack of perplexed for 2 rounds.
While the user is suffering {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}, they must also pass this test at the start of each turn.

languages.text:
Cuando el usuario sufre daño (excepto por un efecto de daño continuado), debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} con una penalización de −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716}. Si falla la {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g}, el usuario sufre +1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplejo{/g} durante 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}.
Mientras el usuario sufra de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}conmoción{/g}, también debe superar la prueba al principio de cada {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user suffers damage (except from damage-over-time effects), they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} penalty. On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the user gains +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
While the user is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}, they must also pass this test at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Cuando el usuario sufre daño (excepto por un efecto de daño continuado), debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} con una penalización de −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716}. Si falla la {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g}, el usuario sufre +1 acumulación de {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplejo{/g} durante 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}.
Mientras el usuario sufra de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}conmoción{/g}, también debe superar la prueba al principio de cada {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}.

languages.text:
Erleidet der Nutzer Schaden (Schaden-über-Zeit-Effekte ausgenommen), muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} mit einem Abzug von −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} bestehen. Misslingt die {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g}, erhält der Nutzer 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang +1 Stapel {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Überrascht{/g}.
Ist der Nutzer mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Erschütterungseffekt{/g} belegt, muss er diese Probe auch zu Beginn jedes {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} bestehen.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user suffers damage (except from damage-over-time effects), they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} penalty. On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the user gains +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
While the user is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}, they must also pass this test at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Erleidet der Nutzer Schaden (Schaden-über-Zeit-Effekte ausgenommen), muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} mit einem Abzug von −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} bestehen. Misslingt die {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g}, erhält der Nutzer 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang +1 Stapel {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Überrascht{/g}.
Ist der Nutzer mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Erschütterungs{/g}effekt belegt, muss er diese Probe auch zu Beginn jedes {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} bestehen.

languages.text:
Chaque fois que l'utilisateur subit des dégâts (hors effets de dégâts progressifs), il doit réaliser un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} avec une pénalité de -{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716}. En cas d'échec, il reçoit +1 cumul de {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Perplexité{/g} pendant 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
S'il souffre de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Commotion cérébrale{/g}, il doit également effectuer ce test au début de chaque {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user suffers damage (except from damage-over-time effects), they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} penalty. On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the user gains +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
While the user is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}, they must also pass this test at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

Chaque fois que l'utilisateur subit des dégâts (hors effets de dégâts progressifs), il doit réaliser un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} avec une pénalité de -{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716}. En cas d'échec, il reçoit +1 cumul de {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}Perplexité{/g} pendant 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
S'il souffre de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Commotion cérébrale{/g}, il doit également effectuer ce test au début de chaque {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı hasara (zamanla hasar veren etkiler hariç) maruz kaldığında −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:Test}testte{/g} başarısız olursa +1 {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}şaşkınlık{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Etkisi 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.
Kullanıcı bir {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}sarsıntıdan{/g} muzdaripse her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turun{/g} başında bu testten de geçmelidir.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user suffers damage (except from damage-over-time effects), they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} penalty. On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the user gains +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
While the user is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}, they must also pass this test at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcı hasara (zamanla hasar veren etkiler hariç) maruz kaldığında −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:Test}testte{/g} başarısız olursa +1 {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}şaşkınlık{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Etkisi 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.
Kullanıcı bir {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}sarsıntıdan{/g} muzdaripse her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turun{/g} başında bu testten de geçmelidir.

languages.text:
使用者每次受到伤害（持续伤害效果除外）时，必须通过一项带有{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716}减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}失败，使用者获得1层{g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}困惑{/g}效果，持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
使用者处于{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}震荡{/g}状态时，每{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始也必须通过此检定。
languages.original_text:
Whenever the user suffers damage (except from damage-over-time effects), they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|0fd5297f4aa7493380d485b210386716} penalty. On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, the user gains +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
While the user is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}, they must also pass this test at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

使用者处于{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}震荡{/g}状态时，每{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始也必须通过此检定。

languages.text: 使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}統率力{/g}が−10%減少する。

traits.locale_text: 使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}統率力{/g}が−10%減少する。
